page_content:
International Student & Scholar Services (ISSS)

H. J. Patterson Hall, Room 1126 Phone: 301-314-7740 globalmaryland.umd.edu/offices/ international-students-scholar-services

ISSS provides international students at UMD with advice on immigration matters, economic difficulty, and social and cultural adjustment to the U.S. and university life. ISSS administers orientation to all new international students, scholars and faculty; organizes workshops on career development and employment options; and provides information on immigration, social and cultural activities, as well as other topics of concern to international students.
